title: gomphia pendula
intro: Gomphia pendula, also known as the hanging gomphia or angel's trumpet vine, is a tropical climbing plant native to tropical Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Gomphia pendula include its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as a natural remedy for wounds and skin infections. Herbal preparations of Gomphia pendula can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can be used topically to treat various health conditions.
